SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARDLE, GREGORY JON AS TO DEFENDANT CLUTTER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GREGORY JON WARDLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLUTTER, INC, REPRESENTED BY KYLE GAFFNEY EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARDLE, GREGORY JON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLUTTER, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
